summary: Verified backend runtime is unaffected by the trimmed /app/backend/requirements.txt (Vercel deploy fix that removed emergentintegrations and other unused libs). Backend boots cleanly, no ImportError/ModuleNotFoundError in supervisor logs, and full 16/16 pytest regression passes against the public BASE_URL. The specifically requested endpoints (/api/, /api/quota, /api/subscribe/config, /api/auth/register, /api/terabox/extract validation, /api/subscribe/create-order mock) all return expected responses.

verified_endpoints.POST /api/auth/register: 200 — fresh timestamped email; subscription_status='free', auth_provider='password', default preferences returned (proves bcrypt+pyjwt+motor+pydantic+email-validator all present)
verified_endpoints.POST /api/terabox/extract (non-terabox u: 400 with 'not a valid terabox' (httpx path reachable, request body parsing works, quota unchanged)
verified_endpoints.POST /api/terabox/extract (fake terabox: 422/502 with quota refund (proves httpx upstream call works)
verified_endpoints.POST /api/webhook/razorpay (bad sig): 400 invalid webhook signature / secret not configured
verified_endpoints.Preferences / History / Favorites / Cont: All pass with dedupe, dup-400, auto-remove @>0.95, and DELETE-all semantics

supervisor_log_check: grep -iE 'ImportError|ModuleNotFoundError' /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log /var/log/supervisor/backend.out.log => 0 matches. Startup log shows 'MongoDB indexes ready • Razorpay mode: mock' and 'Application startup complete.'
critical_code_review_comments: requirements.txt is now minimal and matches server.py imports exactly — good hygiene for Vercel/uv resolver.
No pinning drift observed; all trimmed deps (fastapi, uvicorn, motor, pymongo, pydantic, email-validator, pyjwt, bcrypt, httpx, razorpay, python-multipart, python-dotenv) are actually imported.
No dev/test deps (pytest, black, mypy, etc.) remain in requirements.txt — those live in the runtime venv only. Consider a separate requirements-dev.txt if devs want them reproducible.
test_credentials: N/A — tests use fresh timestamped emails via fresh_email fixture
seed_data_creation: None persisted beyond fresh_email test users; rate_limits collection is cleaned by session-scoped autouse fixture
context_for_next_testing_agent: Trimmed requirements.txt confirmed safe — Vercel deploy should now proceed past the emergentintegrations resolver failure. Backend runtime unaffected. Iterations 1-2 = full backend + frontend regression, iteration 3 = vercel.json smoke test, iteration 4 (this one) = post-requirements-trim regression. Next agent can rely on /app/backend/tests/test_linkplay_backend.py as the canonical backend regression suite.
